description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push, pull request, and a monthly schedule. The workflow should have two jobs: build-linux and build-windows, each running on a different environment and building with different configurations. For build-linux, use ubuntu-latest, install dependencies, install Rust, generate a build system with CMake, build, and upload a Linux artifact. For build-windows, use windows-latest, install Rust, generate a build system with CMake, build, and upload a Windows artifact.
